members.name: Abdullah Arief Ali
members.title: Head of Training @ Strategic Partners & Financial Consultant
members.bio: With over 18 years in financial services, I work at the intersection of wealth, legacy, and leadership. I specialise in Islamic and conventional estate planning, business owner succession, and complex trust and asset restructuring — helping families protect what they've built across generations. I also develop financial professionals through structured training and mentorship. I hold an MSc in Asset & Wealth Management from NTU and serve on the boards of LBKM, TAA Trust Fund, and Amal Care
credentials: Institute of Banking and Finance Singapore Level 3

testimonials.title: My one and only trusted consultant
testimonials.body: Arief has been managing my family's financial affairs for over a decade. He knows our priorities and never recommends anything that doesn't fit who we are.
testimonials.name: Faridah H.

testimonials.title: Finally, an advisor who explained faraid properly
testimonials.body: I had questions about Islamic inheritance for years. Arief sat with me for two hours, walked through faraid, hibah, and CPF nominations — and I left with a plan.
testimonials.name: Rozana Z.

members.name: Noraziemah
members.title: Senior Financial Consultant
members.bio: I joined SOUL Advisors 8 years ago with a simple belief: that every family deserves financial security, regardless of where they start. My focus is on young families, health planning, and helping clients understand what they're buying.

testimonials.title: She made insurance make sense
testimonials.body: Sarah explained everything clearly without jargon. For the first time I actually understood what I was covered for.
testimonials.name: Marcus T.

members.name: Dzulqarnain
members.title: Financial Consultant
members.bio:
I love to travel with my bikes. :)

My clients describe me as patient, thorough, and always reachable. After 5 years in the field, I specialise in helping self-employed and gig economy workers who often fall through the cracks of conventional financial planning.
credentials: Degree in Islamic Studie Major In Hadith (Islamic University Of Madinah

testimonials.title: Finally an adviser I can trust
testimonials.body:
Dzul has been very straightforward in our dealings. He makes the meeting interactive, yet easy to understand. Gone thru with me all my coverage and advised me what was sufficient and lacking. 

Highly recommend if you are looking for an adviser that you can trust!
testimonials.name: Noah

testimonials.title: Looking for policies with better coverage
testimonials.body: I first engaged Dzul for a comprehensive break down of policy coverage to compare with what I currently had at that time. Dzul patiently went through different plans, providing comparisons in detail, and gave his expert opinion on what coverage best fit my lifestyle and my monthly/yearly income. What I liked most about Dzul is he gave me space to decide on my own without hardselling his products. He was genuinely helpful and very professional. I appreciate his thoughtful service.
testimonials.name: Nurul Baharudin

testimonials.title: Clear view of my coverage and plans
testimonials.body: When Dzul first approached me, we knew I already had few plans signed up long time ago. He went thru one by one and explain to me what could possible be lacking in terms of coverage and also savings.  Thank you.
testimonials.name: Fahmi

testimonials.title: Finally understood my coverage
testimonials.body: ​I recently worked with Dzulqarnain to set up my Insurance coverage, and the experience was seamless. He was incredibly professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to answer every question I had without any pressure. I feel much more secure knowing my coverage is in good hands. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a trustworthy advisor!
testimonials.name: Shahiran Basiron

members.bio:
I am a Financial Advisor and Estate Planner who helps families plan with heart and clarity. 

What began for me as a chance encounter with estate planning quickly became a mission to help others protect what truly matters to them.

Coming from a blended family, I understand the emotional weight of legacy planning. Clients value my approachable nature, depth of knowledge, and focus on purpose over pressure.

I've guided hundreds through meaningful planning conversations. I aim to always work  with integrity, faith, and a calm presence. 

Outside work, I enjoy time with my wife, coffee rituals, and model building as a form of mindfulness.

testimonials.body:
My husband and I had been searching for guidance on estate-planning for almost 2 years. We had consulted others for advice before but always came away slightly dissatisfied and unassured of the information received.

We came across EWA's services and from the very beginning, we were pleasantly impressed with their prompt service. It was of utmost importance for us that our wills and nuzriah be prepared in maximum compliance to Islamic laws and yet be fair to our beneficiaries. Iqbal & Haidar embraced all our questions in a very positive attitude and even did their own personal research to provide us with informed answers. They also pointed out other aspects of estate-planning that we hadn't considered, especially the appointment of a legal guardian for our children's and an LPA.

We would highly recommend Iqbal and Haidar's services to anyone seeking advice and clarity on Islamic estate-planning. We wish them the best of success and may Allah bless them for all the assistance provided to us.
testimonials.name: Zahrina

testimonials.body:
I had been looking for someone with a deep understanding of both Shariah and common law in Singapore, particularly in the area of estate planning. It's rare to find experts who are strong in both fields, as most are knowledgeable in one but not the other.

That's when I came across Iqbal. I had an extensive conversation with him, covering topics like standby trusts, testamentary trusts, discretionary trusts, fixed trusts, revocable and irrevocable trusts, hibah mutlak, hibah ruqbah, fatwas, and the interplay between Singapore's civil court, Syariah court, and MUIS in estate proceedings. He even brought up case studies and legal precedents to support his points.

Iqbal clearly came prepared, offering a thorough discussion on these matters from both a secular and religious perspective. I was impressed by his thought process and the clarity with which he presented his ideas and arguments.

He is certainly not your average financial adviser. His passion and expertise in the subject matter were evident, and he is someone I would trust to provide me with an informed and balanced perspective.
testimonials.name: Asyraf

testimonials.body:
I am writing this testimonial to express my deepest appreciation for Iqbal, my financial service consultant or agent at AIA Singapore, who has been nothing short of a beacon of support since 2018. He took over my portfolio from my former agent and manage my Hospitalization, Personal Accident insurance, Life insurance, Investment savings as well as my husband’s and children. From the day he took over, I knew I had made the right choice in having him as my agent.

Iqbal possesses a remarkable ability to listen and understand. He takes into consideration not just the insurance needs of his clients, but also their unique life situations and personal concerns. During our first meeting, he made it a point to learn about my circumstances and answers all my questions which gives me comfortable assurance.

One of the most impressive aspects of Iqbal’s service is his responsiveness whenever I drop him a whatsapp text. It seems no question is too trivial for him. Whenever I reached out with inquiries whether it was about policy details or coverage limits, Iqbal answered promptly. His patience to clarify even the most intricate details have significantly alleviated my concerns. It’s evident that he values communication, and this builds a sense of trust that is crucial in an agent-client relationship.

Efficiency is another key trait that Iqbal embodies. He navigates everything with ease ensuring that I am always aware of the current updates which gives me peace of mind.

Furthermore, Iqbal does not simply sell policies but he educates about the pros and cons of each option. He breaks down complex terms and conditions into easily digestible information for us. I felt empowered to make informed decisions, rather than being pushed toward a sale.

In addition to that, Iqbal has also presented me with alternative solutions that are well-suited to my desired goal. He tailors solutions that resonate with my concerns and life situation. This kind of personalized service is incredibly reassuring, especially when one is making important decisions affecting the future of their family’s financial wellbeing.

He took the time to understand our needs and provided policies that fit our situations perfectly. It is a testament to his dedication and knowledge that he is able to cater to the diverse needs of his clients seamlessly.

In conclusion, I wholeheartedly recommend Iqbal to anyone in need of insurance advice or services. His blend of understanding, efficiency, and thorough knowledge makes him an asset in this industry. He stands out not only as an agent but as a genuine advisor who truly cares about the wellbeing of his clients. If you're looking for someone who will advocate for your best interests and guide you in making informed insurance decisions, Iqbal is the right agent for you. I am more than grateful for his support and guidance and I have no intention of changing my agent for now, looking forward to keep continuing working with him!
testimonials.name: Nuraisah

members.name: Iqbal Nikmatullah
members.title: Financial Advisor | Estate Planner | Son | Husband | Brother

pageText.aboutQuote: You think they got lucky with their wealth. Until you realize that Luck happens when preparation meets opportunity.
pageText.testiSub: I am honored to be part of a chapter in your life. Thank you.
pageText.bookingTitle: Allow me to give you a hint of clarity:
pageText.contactSub:
No matter how small or insignificant it may seem, that little bit of clarity may come in handy down the road.

Thank you for taking the first step and allowing me to help you.
